epic.description:
Members need a self-service way to estimate out-of-pocket dental costs before treatment. Phase 1 delivers a synthetic-data-backed estimator for common procedures with coverage-tier-aware estimates, plan/member cost breakdowns, disclaimer visibility, and strict no-PII behavior.

Business outcome: validate member cost-transparency value with demo-ready quality while meeting performance and privacy constraints.

stories.summary: Procedure selection from supported common-procedure list
stories.description:
As a dental plan member, I want to select a supported dental procedure so that I can request an out-of-pocket estimate.

Acceptance criteria: Given the member opens the estimator and the approved common procedure list is available, when the member selects a supported procedure, then the selected procedure is captured for estimate retrieval.

As a dental plan member, I want an estimate calculated by coverage tier so that I can understand expected out-of-pocket cost.

Acceptance criteria: Given a supported procedure is selected and a coverage tier is selected, when the member requests an estimate, then an out-of-pocket estimate is returned for that procedure and tier.

stories.summary: Estimate result breakdown with compliance disclaimer
stories.description:
As a dental plan member, I want a cost breakdown and disclaimer on results so that I can understand estimate context and limitations.

Acceptance criteria: Given an estimate has been calculated, when the result is displayed, then the plan-paid amount and estimated member responsibility are shown and the approved estimate disclaimer is visible.

As a dental plan member, I want to change coverage tiers and see updated estimates so that I can compare potential cost outcomes.

Acceptance criteria: Given the member is viewing an estimate for a selected procedure, when the member changes to a different coverage tier, then the estimate is recalculated and the displayed breakdown updates accordingly.

stories.summary: Graceful handling for unsupported estimate requests
stories.description:
As a member or office staff user, I want clear error feedback for unsupported estimate requests so that I understand how to proceed.

Acceptance criteria: Given a procedure outside the approved list is requested, when estimate is requested, then no estimate is returned and a clear recovery message prompts selecting a supported procedure.

nfrTasks.description: Ensure estimate retrieval meets P95 response time under 300ms for supported procedures at expected demo load. Validate with reproducible benchmark report.
Verify no PII is collected, persisted, or transmitted in estimator requests, logs, storage, and outbound traffic.
Validate that estimate calculations use synthetic datasets only and do not call enterprise claims or benefits APIs.
Validate procedure selection, tier switching, estimate display, and error states against WCAG 2.1 AA with automated and manual checks.
Validate that approved disclaimer text is visible on every estimate result state and persists through tier changes.
